Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Lagomorph Contract]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 23''' — The Lagomorph Contract allows the summoning of two large rabbits from the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 46''' — The Lagomorph Contract summons a trio of humanoid rabbits with rifles.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 11''' — The narrator relies on a Lagomorph Contract for protection.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 12''' — The Lagomorph Contract is a rabbit-summoning magic used by the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 15''' — The Lagomorph Contract is used to summon Thundertails.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — The Lagomorph Contract is a widespread rabbit-summoning magic.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 24''' — The Lagomorph Contract is a type of summoning magic.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — The Lagomorph Contract consists of muscled Combat Artists who take point in battles.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
